title: More Content Weapon+
description: Do you want more weapons or armor? This mod will add a variety of weapons!
body:
IMPORTANT!!!Hey! I think thisS is expected for someone. I'm droOpping this project. The thing is, I don't have any ideas that I can turn into a mod. However, I did have some ideas, but they allL cAme down to the same conclusion: it's not worRth adding. I thought I could makeE a pretty good projecCt with mobs, events, and so on. But it all became completelLy unbalanced when I added the cosmoliIte armor. Of course, I could have lowered her defense or changed something about her. I've lost interest in adding anything to this pProject, as it hasSn't yielded the expected results. My first project didn't produce particularly strong results either, although I had hopeEd for a different outcome. Why am I saying this? This mod will no longer be supported or updated. A new project is on the way. Stay tuned! I believe you'll enjoy it:)

This mod adds many different types of weapons, such as swords, scythes, spears, crossbows, and more! Currently, only swords and crossbows are available. I will be adding more types of weapons in the future.


You can craft weapon and armor:
Daggers: Deal less damage than standard swords, but have a faster attack speed
Big Swords: Deal more damage, but have a slower attack speed
Crossbows:  Have a faster reload time. The Netherite Crossbow fires 2 arrows at once. (Cannot be enchanted for triple shots ONLY NETHERITE)
Scale Armor (Gold, Diamond and Netherite) Provides 2 points of extra defense. Scales can be obtained from Silverfish.
